review_items.title: Jul-Aug 2025: Site electricity data missing
review_items.description: Meter readings unavailable during Phase 3 power rerouting. Contact Hafslund Nett for temporary meter data.

review_items.title: ISO 45001 §6.1.2: 12 high-risk activities missing risk assessments
review_items.description: Risk register shows 12 Category A activities without completed HIRA (Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment). Required before Phase 3 concrete pour.

review_items.title: Incident rate above sector benchmark
review_items.description: LTIR 3.2 vs. Norwegian construction sector average 2.1. 8 recordable incidents in 2025 — 5 involving scaffolding.

review_items.title: Crane operator certifications: 2 of 8 expired
review_items.description: Operators K. Hansen and M. Berg have expired G11 crane certificates. Arbeidstilsynet requires current certification.

review_items.title: Fall protection compliance: harness inspection overdue
review_items.description: 14 of 52 fall protection harnesses overdue for annual inspection per EN 365:2004.

audit_log.detail: Case CASE-003 created — construction safety audit
OHS manual and risk assessments uploaded
Extraction complete — 448 data points, safety records indexed

measures.title: Scaffolding Safety System Upgrade — Smart Guardrails
measures.description: Replace conventional tube-and-fitting scaffolding guardrails with modular system scaffolding (Layher Allround) with integrated toe boards and self-closing gates at all access points.

evidence.measurement: Incident analysis: 5 of 8 recordable incidents in 2025 involved scaffolding — 3 falls from height, 2 struck-by falling objects
evidence.nameplate: Current: mixed tube-and-fitting scaffolding. Proposed: Layher Allround 1.09m system, TÜV-certified to EN 12810/12811
evidence.method: Cost avoidance: avg incident cost NOK 850,000 (insurance + lost time + investigation) × projected 1.7 prevented incidents/year = NOK 1,445,000
evidence.confidence_note: Incident reduction rate based on industry studies (SINTEF 2023) — site-specific conditions may vary

measures.title: Real-time Worker Location and Hazard Zone Monitoring
measures.description: Deploy UWB (ultra-wideband) positioning system to track worker locations relative to active crane zones, excavation edges, and other dynamic hazards. Automatic alerts when workers enter exclusion zones.

evidence.measurement: Near-miss log 2025: 23 unauthorized entries into active crane swing radius, 8 proximity events near excavation edges
evidence.nameplate: Proposed: Trimble CrewSight 520 tags (60 units), 12 UWB anchors, Tekla integration for BIM-based zone definitions
evidence.method: Projected reduction in crane-related incidents: 65% (based on Skanska pilot study SE-2024). Cost avoidance + productivity gain from reduced crane downtime for zone violations
evidence.price_basis: System lease NOK 185,000/year incl. maintenance. Crane downtime cost: NOK 4,200/hour
evidence.confidence_note: Technology proven in Scandinavian pilots — site topology (multi-building) adds complexity to UWB coverage

measures.title: Diesel-to-Electric Equipment Transition — Phase 3
measures.description: Replace 4 diesel-powered site equipment units with electric alternatives: 2 mini excavators (Volvo ECR25 Electric), 1 wheel loader (Kramer 5065e), and 1 aerial work platform (JLG EC520AJ).

evidence.measurement: Fuel consumption log: 4 diesel units consuming 14,200 L/year combined (diesel) vs. estimated 52,000 kWh/year (electric)
evidence.nameplate: Replacing: CAT 302.7 (2x), Volvo L25 (1x), JLG 520AJ (1x). With: Volvo ECR25 Electric (2x), Kramer 5065e (1x), JLG EC520AJ (1x)
evidence.method: Diesel cost: 14,200 L × NOK 18.50/L = NOK 262,700. Electric cost: 52,000 kWh × NOK 1.20/kWh = NOK 62,400. Net saving: NOK 200,300 fuel + NOK 180,000 reduced maintenance over 5 years
evidence.price_basis: Diesel: Circle K fleet rate NOK 18.50/L (2025). Electricity: Hafslund site connection NOK 1.20/kWh incl. demand charges
evidence.confidence_note: Electric equipment performance in Norwegian winter conditions (-15°C) may reduce battery range 20-30% — winter pilot recommended
